title: Glitches
description: This mod adds random Glitch Blocks to the world. Stepping on one of these blocks teleports you to a random location nearby.
body:
This mod adds random Glitch Blocks to the world. Stepping on one of these blocks teleports you to a random location nearby.

Also you can get this Glith block if you'll break it with any pickaxe.

🪲Since this is the first version of the mod, there may be bugs. Please be patient; we'll fix them if mod will downloaded by few people🔧

Enjoy the game❤️
